title: psychotria pumila var. buzica
intro: Psychotria pumila var. buzica, also known as Buzica, is a small, woody shrub native to Eastern Europe and the Balkans. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Buzica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce the severity of colds and flu, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Buzica is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat various conditions, including sore throats and digestive issues.
